name: response_formatter
description: Decides the best output format for a given request and content, then renders it. Supports JSON, plain text, Markdown, HTML, CSV, and YAML. Use 'decide' to get a format recommendation with rationale, 'format' to render content in a specific format, or 'auto' to decide and render in one step.

request.description: The original user or agent request text. Used by 'decide' and 'auto' to determine the best format.

content.description: The raw content to analyse or render.

format_type.description: Target output format for the 'format' action.

context.description: Optional downstream context to improve format decision accuracy (e.g., 'this will be displayed in a web browser', 'user wants machine-readable output').

title.description: Document title used when generating HTML output. Default 'Report'.
